rulings.Case Title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL ET AL VS. ANNE KIHAGI ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Issuance Of Order Expunging Improper Lis Pendens Against Receivership Real Property Located At 1901 Pacific Avenue San Francisco California
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, December 21, 2021, line 1 RECEIVER KEVIN SINGER'S NOTICE OF MOTION FOR ISSUANCE OF ORDER EXPUNGING IMPROPER LIS PENDENS AGAINST RECEIVERSHIP REAL PROPERTY LOCATED AT 1901 PACIFIC AVENUE SAN FRANCISCO CALIFORNIA is transferred to department 210 to be heard at 11:30 a.m. on December 21, 2021. = (501/REQ) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303; or Phone Dial in: (415) 762-9988; Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: VINCENT DILELLA VS. ARISTOMENIS PIKEAS ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, December 21, 2021, line 6, DEFENDANT ARISTOMENIS PIKEAS' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint and notice state a cause of action for unlawful detainer. SFRO is drafted in a way allowing for Plaintiff's interpretation without any limitations. rulings.Case Title: CHEVALIER PARTNERS, VS. CROSSFIT GOLDEN GATE, LLC, ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, December 21, 2021, line 7, DEFENDANT CROSSFIT GOLDEN GATE, LLC'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED with leave to amend for Plaintiff to clearly allege the basis (operative notice) for each count. Currently, the first count appears to be based solely on January 10, 2020 Notice for which no proof of service is included, and which appears to be expressly superseded by a later-served notice that forms the basis of the second cause of action for nuisance. In opposition to the demurrer Plaintiff implies that both counts are based on the later-served notice under CCP 1161(3) and (4) fro the purposes of stating a cause of action for unlawful detainer. However, the first count of FAC does not reference the second notice. Plaintiff shall have 5 days from notice of entry of order to file an amended complaint. = (501/REQ) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303; or Phone Dial in: (415) 762-9988; Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified and the opposing party does not appear.
